backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the PROXIIS backend with task management, user/task profiles, authorization via mixins, and CRUD operations for tasks, profiles, and leaderboard functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the AuthPromptBar dismissed-state fix to its affected file (App.tsx) and associated components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as a build planning reference for the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading Google Sign-In, QRCode.js scripts, and mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view routing, the global AuthPromptContext, and AuthPromptBar visibility/dismissed state, ensuring dismissed state always resets when showAuthPrompt is called.
frontend/src/components/AuthPromptBar.ts: Fixed bottom bar component that prompts unauthenticated users to sign in via Internet Identity, with slide-in/out animation and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable pill-button category filter bar for the task hub, with gradient highlight on the selected category.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Dialog modal allowing task performers to upload a completion photo and task creators to verify and star-rate completed tasks.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Renders a horizontal scrollable bar with three toggle filter buttons (Newest, Most Urgent, Highest Paying) that highlight when active and notify the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar for the hub view featuring the PROXIIS brand title, an expandable search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays the top 10 users from the leaderboard hook, showing rank, earnings, tasks completed, and average rating, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, collecting title, category, price, location, safe spot, Telegram handle, deadline, and a photo, then submitting via the useCreateTask hook with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Generates and renders a UPI payment QR code using the window.QRCode CDN library for a given task price, displaying the amount including a 10% platform fee.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Presentational component that renders a row of up to five star icons filled, half-filled, or empty based on a numeric rating prop.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying a task's photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price; clicking it checks authentication/profile status before opening the TaskDetailsSheet.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting (with UPI payment), toggling Telegram chat, completing, and deleting a task, with role-based visibility for creator vs. performer.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Displays a vertically auto-scrolling reel of recent completed tasks with a seamless loop animation using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a placeholder UPI ID constant used for payment processing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Custom hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and provides signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Custom hook that fetches the leaderboard list of profiles from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: Custom hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, including getting the caller's profile, creating a profile via Google, and saving profile updates, all backed by React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when a referenced element scrolls into view, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Custom hooks for task mutation actions—assigning a performer, completing, verifying, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting tasks—each invalidating relevant React Query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: Custom hooks for querying tasks (all tasks, search, user post history) and creating a new task via the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a dark-mode color theme (using OKLCH values), and includes animations like auth-flicker and smooth scrolling utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building deep links: Telegram profile URLs and UPI payment links with a 10% platform fee applied to the price.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between datetime-local input strings and bigint nanosecond timestamps, plus a human-readable deadline formatter using Intl.DateTimeFormat.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main task hub view that displays a filterable, searchable, and category-sorted list of tasks using TaskCard components, with a floating button to open the PostTaskModal for authenticated users with profiles.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, features grid, and social proof section, using scroll-triggered animations and navigation buttons to direct users to the hub.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: User profile view handling Internet Identity login, Google OAuth linking, profile creation/editing, and displaying the user's post history with ratings and stats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), border radii, fonts, font sizes, and box shadows, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and feature requests; currently focused on a fix for the AuthPromptBar incorrectly showing a 'dismissed' state unexpectedly.
